tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentSchemasCreate
tools.description: Creates a document schema.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentSchemasList
tools.description: Lists document schemas.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsCreate
tools.description: Creates a document.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsDocumentLinksCreate
tools.description: Create a link between a source document and a target document.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsFetchAcl
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns NOT_FOUND error if the resource does not exist. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists but does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsLinkedSources
tools.description: Return all source document-links from the document.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsLinkedTargets
tools.description: Return all target document-links from the document.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsLock
tools.description: Lock the document so the document cannot be updated by other users.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsReferenceIdDelete
tools.description: Deletes a document. Returns NOT_FOUND if the document does not exist.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsReferenceIdGet
tools.description: Gets a document. Returns NOT_FOUND if the document does not exist.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsSearch
tools.description: Searches for documents using provided SearchDocumentsRequest. This call only returns documents that the caller has permission to search against.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsDocumentsSetAcl
tools.description: Sets the access control policy for a resource. Replaces any existing policy.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsInitialize
tools.description: Provisions resources for given tenant project. Returns a long running operation.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsRuleSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates a ruleset.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsRuleSetsList
tools.description: Lists rulesets.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsSynonymSetsCreate
tools.description: Creates a SynonymSet for a single context. Throws an ALREADY_EXISTS exception if a synonymset already exists for the context.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsSynonymSetsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a SynonymSet for a given context. Throws a NOT_FOUND exception if the SynonymSet is not found.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsSynonymSetsGet
tools.description: Gets a SynonymSet for a particular context. Throws a NOT_FOUND exception if the Synonymset does not exist

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsSynonymSetsList
tools.description: Returns all SynonymSets (for all contexts) for the specified location.

tools.name: projects.contentwarehouseProjectsLocationsSynonymSetsPatch
tools.description: Remove the existing SynonymSet for the context and replaces it with a new one. Throws a NOT_FOUND exception if the SynonymSet is not found.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
